years heartbreak and another up plenty of Downs in the career of tibur peanut Rubio winning by six seconds from Pino 12 in front of Cepeda those three animating the race another top five for Derek G competition Rubio with his excavates moves into third place a two-star stage coming up stage 14 from Switzerland heading straight back into Italy as one Mighty Mountain to take on but it's a long way from the Finish it's Paso sempione the simplon pass before heading across to Lombardi will it be a Sprint finish will the Breakaway go well this shouldn't Italia anything can happen and things as we
